company.name: Krevio
company.tagline: We build complete online systems for local service businesses

core_build.description: Custom website + AI chatbot + owner dashboard + GEO/SEO optimization
core_build.ownership: Client owns everything — website, leads, data, code

managed_services.description: Ongoing chatbot management, content updates, GEO monitoring, lead optimization, priority support

starter.name: Starter
starter.includes: AI chatbot hosting + voice, basic GEO monitoring, monthly performance report, email support (48h)

growth.name: Growth
growth.includes: Everything in Starter + 2-4 monthly content updates (GEO + SEO optimized), Google Business Profile management, lead capture optimization, email support (24h)

accelerator.name: Accelerator
accelerator.includes: Everything in Growth + active GEO optimization (entity work, schema, citations), lead generation campaigns, full website management, quarterly strategy calls, priority support (12h)

managed_services.cancel_policy: Month-to-month — cancel anytime, everything stays yours. Quarterly commitment available at 10% discount.

features: Custom mobile-first website on your domain
AI chatbot in English and Spanish — answers questions 24/7
Owner dashboard preview showing what your lead pipeline and metrics will look like
GEO/SEO — get found on Google AND AI search (ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity)
Email lead notifications — get alerted instantly when a prospect submits a request
You own everything we build — no per-lead fees, no lock-in

hvac.highlights: System tracking, maintenance plans, seasonal campaigns

remodeling.highlights: Project portfolio, estimate requests, before/after gallery

differentiators: vs Thumbtack/Angi: You pay $500-$2,000/mo for shared leads with 10-20% close rates. With Krevio, you own your leads exclusively through your own website.
vs Big agencies: They charge $10K+ for setup and $1,500-$3,000/mo for SEO alone. We build custom starting at $1,500 setup and manage everything from $497/mo.
vs Freelancers: Lottery quality. We deliver agency-grade work with AI precision.
vs DIY (Wix/Squarespace): Generic templates. We build systems, not pages.
GEO optimization: We optimize for AI search (ChatGPT, Gemini), not just Google. Almost no one offers GEO to local businesses yet.
No long-term contracts: Month-to-month. Unlike Angi's 12-month contract with 35% cancellation penalty.
geo_explanation: GEO stands for Generative Engine Optimization. When someone asks ChatGPT or Google AI for a plumber near them, GEO makes sure YOUR business shows up. It's like SEO but for AI search engines — and almost nobody is doing it yet.
process: Step 1: Discovery — Tell us about your business. We show you a working demo tailored to your industry.
Step 2: Build — We build your complete system in 2-4 weeks. Website, chatbot, dashboard, GEO.
Step 3: Launch + Grow — Your system goes live on your domain. You own everything. Optional managed services to keep growing.

faq.a: Setup starts at $1,500. Managed services have 3 tiers: Starter at $497/mo (chatbot + GEO monitoring), Growth at $697/mo (adds content + GBP management), and Accelerator at $997/mo (full stack — GEO optimization, lead gen, website management, strategy calls). No per-lead fees, month-to-month.
Yes. Your website, your leads, your data, your code — all yours. If you ever cancel managed services, everything stays with you.
The build is a one-time investment. Managed services are optional, starting at $497/month for our Starter tier. Month-to-month — cancel anytime.

faq.q: How does this compare to Thumbtack or Angi?
faq.a: On those platforms, you pay $500-$2,000/month for shared leads sent to 4-8 competitors, with 10-20% close rates and no ownership. With Krevio, you own your website, your chatbot captures leads exclusively for you, and there are no per-lead fees. Most clients save money in month 2.

faq.q: Do you work with businesses outside DFW?
faq.a: We're based in DFW and specialize in local service businesses here, but we can work with businesses anywhere.
Most projects launch in 2-4 weeks from kickoff.

GEO is Generative Engine Optimization — it makes your business show up when people search using AI tools like ChatGPT, Google AI, or Perplexity. Think of it as SEO for the AI age. Almost no one is doing this for local businesses yet — that's our edge.
No long-term contracts. Everything is month-to-month. We offer a 10% discount if you commit quarterly, but it's optional. Compare that to Angi's 12-month lock-in with a 35% cancellation penalty.
